disagreements.chief_strategist_resolution: Use most conservative CIO manual review posture when agents disagree.
Preserve deterministic operator blocks and escalate risk items to CIO review.

agents.agent_role: Evaluate active thesis lifecycle states from the configured thesis registry.
agents.summary: Thesis lifecycle desk evaluates active theses for confirmation, weakening, contradiction, watch status, or archive readiness using evidence from registry and operator blocks.
key_findings: [DATASET] Thesis registry shows 2 active theses (TRUMP_UNCERTAINTY_THESIS, PETRO_RECYCLED_DOLLAR_THESIS) and 4 confirmed theses (including AI Semis Fragility) with CIO manual review required for all.
[OPERATOR] Deterministic operator blocks prevent automatic execution; all theses require CIO manual verification per review_policy.
[THESIS] AI Semis Fragility thesis is confirmed with 73% probability (current_probability: 0.73) based on 4 evidence deltas totaling 0.21.
risk_flags: P1: Earnings calendar catalysts (FDX, MU, NKE) could trigger thesis validation or invalidation
P2: Gold thesis confirmation may not separate from concentration risk due to overlapping assets
P3: Archive mismatch risk if thesis states conflict with operator blocks
blind_spots: Insufficient evidence to confirm gold thesis separation from concentration risk

agents.agent_role: Adversarial review of hidden assumptions, fragile causal chains, liquidity risk, and correlation risk.
agents.summary: Adversarial lens: exposing hidden assumptions in concentration metrics and P/L integrity conflicts
key_findings: [DATASET] P/L integrity conflicts in QBTS, LUNR, QUBT with $94.24+ discrepancies
[OPERATOR] Concentration HHI (equity-only) at 0.2532 indicating severe concentration risk
[BRIER] VXX and VIXY positions show 0.3459 and 0.3342 weight vs equity capital despite low total AUM exposure
risk_flags: P1: Unverified cost basis in moomoo for QBTS, LUNR, QUBT causing P/L integrity breaches
P2: VXX/VIXY concentration risk (0.3459/0.3342 weight vs equity capital) with no liquidity buffers
P3: Sector exposure imbalance (Industrials 0.0119, Multi-Asset 0.0193, Technology 0.006, UNKNOWN 0.0187) indicating hidden sector risk
blind_spots: Insufficient evidence on whether VXX/VIXY positions are truly concentrated or if liquidity risk is overstated
